metadata.description: Plugins to read .og4 and .og3 files of Oribos orienteering software

plugins.name: oribos
plugins.description: Adds knowledge of the OG4/OG3 file format (ZIP archives containing XML race data) and a start-list skill that builds fair start grid proposals as CSV. Claude automatically loads the skills when working with .og4/.og3 files or start lists.
